nn-NO.0d97e23f-2b41-4f7c-96cc-42487acd51aa:
Dersom du er busett i Noreg og får minst 50 prosent uføretrygd frå Nav, vil du automatisk få tilsendt honnørkort i samband med vedtak om uføretrygd. Dette kjem i posten i tillegg til elektronisk vedtak på nav.no.

Dersom honnørkortet manglar når du får vedtaket om uføretrygd frå Nav, eller du har mista eller øydelagt honnørkortet, kan du kontakte oss.

Du kan kontakte oss skriftleg via Skriv til oss (blir opna i ny fane), eller du kan ringje oss på telefon 55 55 33 33.

Du kan lese meir om honnørkort på nav.no (blir opna i ny fane).
nn-NO.<h3>Honnørkort - Uføretrygd fra et annet:
Honnørkort - Uføretrygd frå eit anna EØS-land

For å få utskrive honnørkort må du dokumentera at du får varig offentleg uføretrygd med minst 50 % frå eit anna EØS-land, tilsvarande uføretrygd frå Folketrygden. NAV vil utskriva honnørkort når du kan dokumentera varig offentleg uføretrygd over 50 prosent frå eit anna EØS-land.

For at NAV skal kunna utskriva kortet må du fylla ut dette skjemaet. Skjemaet må vera signert av utanlandsk trygdestyresmakt.

Med honnørkort får du redusert billettpris ved bruk av kollektive transportmiddel. Korta gir også rett til honnørrabatt for medfølgjande ektefelle eller registrert partnar, uansett alder.

På nav.no kan du lesa meir om honnørkort (blir opna i ny fane)

Du finn meir informasjon på regjeringa.no om kven som kan få honnørrabatt og for kva reiser rabatten gjeld (blir opna i ny fane)

en.Med honnørkort får du redusert billettpr: A concessionary card grants you reduced ticket prices when using public transport. The card also offers you a concessionary discount for an accompanying spouse or registered partner, regardless of their age.
en.<h3>Honnørkort - Uføretrygd fra et annet:
Concessionary card - Disability pension from another EEA country.

To receive a concessionary card you must document that you receive a permanent government disability pension of a minimum 50% from another EEA country, corresponding to a disability pension from the National Insurance Scheme. NAV will issue the concessionary card when you can document a permanent government disability pension from another EEA country.
en.Bekreftelse på vedtak om uføretrygd for: Confirmation of decision regarding disability pension for the issue of concessionary card
en.For at NAV skal kunne utstede kortet må: For NAV to issue the card you must complete this form. The form must be signed by the foreign national insurance authority.
en.På nav.no kan du lese mer om <a href=\"h:
At nav.no, you can read more abouthonnørkort (opens in a new tab)

You can find further information at: regjeringen.no about who is entitled to receive concessionary discounts and about journeys where the discount applies (opens in a new tab)
en.Bekreftelse fra utenlandsk trygdemyndigh: Confirmation from foreign national insurance authority
en.589b5faa-f185-44a5-bfa5-88c60600e990: Nav only disclose personal information to others when we have legal authority to do so.
en.Utenlandsk identitetsnummer / fødselsnum: Foreign ID no. / date of birth

 You can read more about concessionary card (opens in a new tab).

  • For Nav to issue the card you must complete this form.
  • The form must be signed by the foreign national insurance authority.

To receive a concessionary card you must document that you receive a permanent government disability pension of a minimum 50% from another EEA country, corresponding to a disability pension from the National Insurance Scheme.
en.13ea374b-8f02-4565-ab3f-f56cc74c5012:
To receive a concessionary card you must document that you receive a permanent government disability pension of a minimum 50% from another EEA country, corresponding to a disability pension from the National Insurance Scheme. 

You can read more about concessionary card (opens in new tab).
en.59a5ba24-42a5-4650-85be-bfd2dbcf9fdc: We only disclose personal information to others when we have legal authority to do so.
en.f9ca1486-0c70-4757-a81f-502e61e14d9a:
• A concessionary card grants you reduced ticket prices when using public transport.
  • The card also offers you a concessionary discount for an accompanying spouse or registered partner, regardless of their age.

You can find further information about who is entitled to receive concessionary discounts and about journeys where the discount applies (opens in new tab).
en.20cccbb6-0074-4973-87f9-286072db33ec: For Nav to issue the card you must complete this form. The form must be signed by the foreign national insurance authority.
en.51eb6c15-748d-4b18-b5f2-43f526839c40:
A concessionary card grants you reduced ticket prices when using public transport.

The card also offers you a concessionary discount for an accompanying spouse or registered partner, regardless of their age.

Read more about who is entitled to receive concessionary discounts and about journeys where the discount applies (opens in a new tab).
en.0d97e23f-2b41-4f7c-96cc-42487acd51aa:
If you are residing in Norway and receive at least 50 percent disability benefit from Nav, you will automatically be sent a concessionary card as part of the decision on disability benefit. This will arrive by postal mail in addition to the electronic decision on nav.no.

If the concessionary card is missing when you receive the decision on disability benefit from Nav, or if you have lost or damaged the concessionary card, you can contact us.

You can contact us in writing via Write to us (opens in new tab), or you can call us at 55 55 33 33.

You can read more about the concessionary card at nav.no (opens in new tab).
en.<h3>Honnørkort - Uføretrygd fra et annet:
Concessionary card - Disability pension from another EEA country

To receive a concessionary card you must document that you receive a permanent government disability pension of a minimum 50% from another EEA country, corresponding to a disability pension from the National Insurance Scheme. NAV will issue the concessionary card when you can document a permanent government disability pension from another EEA country.

For NAV to issue the card you must complete this form. The form must be signed by the foreign national insurance authority.

A concessionary card grants you reduced ticket prices when using public transport. The card also offers you a concessionary discount for an accompanying spouse or registered partner, regardless of their age.

At nav.no, you can read more about concessionary card (opens in a new tab)

You can find further information at: regjeringen.no about who is entitled to receive concessionary discounts and about journeys where the discount applies (opens in a new tab)
en.Har du bosteds- eller oppholdsadresse i: Do you have a residential/temporary stay address in Norway?
en.Oppgi stønadstype for ytelser som er til: State the type of benefits granted due to permanently reduced work capacity of minimum 50%.
en.6ecc80ae-522f-41ca-9b90-35b1afa8c4a4: Who is entitled to receive concessionary discounts and about journeys where the discount applies
